title: Mini Foods
description: A lightweight and minimal texture pack that reduces the size some foods
body: A lightweight and minimal texture pack that reduces the size of some food items for a cleaner, less cluttered inventory. Designed to keep the classic Minecraft style while improving visual clarity and making gameplay feel sleeker. ![Smaller food items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3cdf42eaa2f865d29c03cc1dbd518a4d661cc5a2_0.webp)
